title: Integrate deterministic reference datasets into evaluation flow
description:
## Summary
Integrate deterministic reference datasets into evaluation flows so a score can be evaluated against its frozen reference dataset.

## Deliverables
- Allow evaluation tooling to run directly against the score's assigned reference dataset.
- Keep evaluation source-agnostic once the dataset exists.
- Make deterministic reference datasets the basis for repeatable regression testing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: wire evaluation command to resolve score-assigned deterministic reference dataset pointers and run accuracy evaluation directly from that DataSet artifact.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented deterministic reference dataset integration in evaluation flow.

Changes:
- Added accuracy CLI option: --reference-dataset-role [active|regression|benchmark].
- Added resolver helper `get_reference_dataset_for_score()` that reads score pointers:
  - referenceDataSetId
  - referenceRegressionDataSetId
  - referenceBenchmarkDataSetId
  and resolves to the corresponding DataSet.
- Integrated this into cloud-dataset loading branch for `evaluate accuracy`.
  Selection precedence now is:
  1) --dataset-id
  2) --reference-dataset-role
  3) --data-source-name/--data-source-key/--data-source-id

Result:
- Evaluation tooling can run directly against score-assigned deterministic reference datasets.
- Flow remains source-agnostic once DataSet artifact exists.

Validation:
- Added tests: plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py
- pytest -q plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations_reference_dataset_test.py => 3 passed
- py_compile passed for modified evaluation module.
